title: The Midnight Library
author: Matt Haig
description: Between life and death there is a library with infinite books, each one the story of another life you could have lived. Nora Seed finds herself there and must decide what makes life worth living.

title: Atomic Habits
author: James Clear
description: A proven framework for building good habits and breaking bad ones. James Clear reveals how tiny changes in behavior can lead to remarkable results over time.

title: A Brief History of Time
author: Stephen Hawking
description: Stephen Hawking takes us on a journey through the universe — from the Big Bang to black holes — making complex science accessible to every curious mind.

title: The Lost Bookshop
author: Evie Woods
description: A cozy mystery weaving together the lives of three strangers connected by a magical bookshop that appears and disappears at will across Dublin streets.

title: Deep Work
author: Cal Newport
description: Cal Newport argues that the ability to focus without distraction is the superpower of the 21st century and provides strategies to cultivate deep, meaningful work.

title: Sapiens
author: Yuval Noah Harari
description: A sweeping narrative of humanity's creation and evolution, exploring how Homo sapiens came to dominate the earth through cognitive revolution, agriculture, and science.

title: Klara and the Sun
author: Kazuo Ishiguro
description: Told from the perspective of Klara, an Artificial Friend with remarkable observational qualities, this novel asks what it means to love and what it means to be human.

title: The Pragmatic Programmer
author: David Thomas
description: A guide to writing better software filled with practical wisdom — from personal responsibility and career development to architectural techniques for flexible, reusable code.

title: The Selfish Gene
author: Richard Dawkins
description: Richard Dawkins revolutionizes our understanding of natural selection, arguing that genes — not organisms — are the true units of evolution in this landmark science classic.

title: The Secret History
author: Donna Tartt
description: A dark literary thriller about a group of eccentric classics students who reconstruct an ancient ritual that ends in murder — and the devastating cover-up that follows.

title: Clean Code
author: Robert C. Martin
description: Uncle Bob shares the best agile practices of cleaning code on the fly and teaches you how to write code that is readable, maintainable, and built to last.

title: The Gene
author: Siddhartha Mukherjee
description: From the Pulitzer Prize-winning author, an extraordinary history of the gene and a meditation on the future of our genetically altered world and what it means for humanity.
